chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 874 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 13. 2. For orders on CMA No. 2855/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 15.01.2026. None present. This reference is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On successive previous occasions, time was sought on behalf of the applicant’s counsel. On the last date of hearing, none was present on behalf of the applicant. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
